narration: Every time you say 'let's just split it evenly,' your brain switches into a completely different spending mode. And it's costing you over a thousand dollars a year.
visual: Dark background. Restaurant plate SVG with fork and knife. Large orange 'SPLIT IT?' text springs in. Dollar signs float in from corners. Badge: '$1,100/YEAR'.

narration: Here's why — when costs are shared equally, your brain recalculates every item at a fraction of its real price. That twenty-dollar cocktail suddenly feels like it only costs you five bucks.
visual: Light background. Brain SVG. Three thought-bubble cards slide in from the right: 'LOBSTER — ONLY $8 EACH', 'COCKTAIL — JUST $4 EACH', 'DESSERT — WHY NOT?' Label: 'SHARED COST = MORE SPENDING'.

narration: Researchers at the University of California found that equal-split diners spend thirty percent more per person than people who pay for exactly what they ordered. Thirty percent every single time.
visual: Dark background. Two bar charts side by side. White bar labeled 'PAY OWN: $48' and orange bar labeled 'SPLIT EQUAL: $62'. Orange '+30% MORE' badge springs in below.

narration: And nobody speaks up because nobody wants to look cheap. So everyone silently orders more, and everyone silently pays more — for every single group meal.
visual: Light background. Two person silhouettes at a table. Matching orange thought bubbles above each: 'I LOOK CHEAP'. Plate between them. Label: 'EVERYONE ORDERS MORE / NOBODY SAYS ANYTHING'.

narration: On a three-thousand-dollar annual dining budget, that thirty percent tax is eleven hundred dollars a year. Invested at seven percent for ten years, that's fifteen thousand three hundred dollars you handed to the table.
visual: Dark background. Orange piggy bank SVG. Progress bar fills. Counter animates from zero up to $15,300. Label below: 'AT 7% ANNUAL RETURN OVER 10 YEARS'.

narration: The fix is simple — split by item, not by table total. Use Splitwise or just ask for separate checks. Small habit, eleven hundred dollars back in your pocket every year.
visual: Light background. Phone SVG showing itemized receipt. Three action cards slide in: 'SPLIT BY ITEM NOT TOTAL', 'USE SPLITWISE OR VENMO', orange highlight card 'SAVE $1,100 A YEAR'. CTA: 'FOLLOW FOR MORE MONEY HACKS'.
